phases.title: Learning the terrain
phases.narrative: Small, safe, everywhere — hundreds of commits across every corner of the app while the mental map forms.

phases.title: Taking ownership
phases.narrative: Commits get bigger and more surgical — Maya stops fixing symptoms and starts fixing systems.

phases.title: Systems and scale
phases.narrative: The work turns multiplicative: platform pieces, review leverage, and the paths other engineers build on.

accomplishments.title: Made a 5,000-row dashboard feel instant

star.situation: The ledger dashboard locked up rendering 5,000+ rows; support tickets called it "frozen".
star.task: Restore responsiveness without changing behavior or breaking the export path.
star.action: Introduced row virtualization, memoized the expensive cells, code-split the charts, and lazy-loaded the export module.
star.result: First paint p75 5.2s → 2.1s, 40% fewer renders, Lighthouse 61 → 94.

accomplishments.resumeBullet: Cut dashboard first-paint 60% (5.2s → 2.1s) by introducing row virtualization and render memoization.

accomplishments.title: Versioned the public API and killed the N+1 pagination

star.situation: Offset pagination collapsed above 100k records and blocked two enterprise deals.
star.task: Ship /v2 with cursor pagination — zero breaking changes for 240 existing integrations.
star.action: Designed the cursor contract, dual-served /v1 and /v2 behind a compatibility layer, added contract tests for every documented consumer path.
star.result: p99 list latency 8.4s → 410ms on 100k-row accounts; zero breaking-change tickets filed post-launch.

accomplishments.resumeBullet: Shipped API /v2 (cursor pagination, zero breaking changes) — p99 list latency 8.4s → 410ms.

accomplishments.title: Took the frontend build from 14 minutes to 4

star.situation: Every PR waited 14+ minutes for CI; engineers batched changes to avoid the queue, making reviews bigger and riskier.
star.task: Get the feedback loop under 5 minutes without buying more runners.
star.action: Introduced remote build caching, pruned 31 phantom dependencies, split the test matrix by change surface, and added preview deploys off the cache.
star.result: Build p50 14m20s → 4m05s, 89% cache hit rate, CI spend down 62%.

accomplishments.resumeBullet: Cut CI build time 71% (14m → 4m) with remote caching and change-scoped test splitting; −62% CI spend.

accomplishments.title: Built the token pipeline that ended per-page theming

star.situation: Four products themed themselves with copy-pasted CSS; a brand refresh was quoted at six weeks of manual edits.
star.task: Make theming a data change, not a code change.
star.action: Extracted 212 design tokens, generated platform outputs (CSS variables, TS constants) from one source, migrated 61 components, and wired a11y contrast checks into CI.
star.result: The brand refresh shipped in 4 days; contrast violations in CI dropped to zero.

accomplishments.resumeBullet: Designed the 212-token theming pipeline that turned a 6-week brand refresh into a 4-day data change.

accomplishments.title: Rebuilt data flow around an optimistic query cache

star.situation: Every mutation refetched whole collections; the app felt like a page reload on every click.
star.task: Make interactions instant while keeping the server as the source of truth.
star.action: Introduced a normalized query cache with optimistic updates and rollback, plus a mutation queue for flaky connections.
star.result: Interaction-to-feedback under 50ms across the app; refetch traffic down 78%.

accomplishments.resumeBullet: Made every interaction feel instant (<50ms feedback) with an optimistic query cache; −78% refetch traffic.

accomplishments.title: Closed the accessibility audit — 94 findings to zero

star.situation: An enterprise prospect's accessibility audit returned 94 findings and a hard deadline in the contract.
star.task: Reach zero open findings before the renewal date, and stay there.
star.action: Fixed focus order and ARIA semantics across 40+ components, added keyboard paths to every interactive element, and made axe checks a merge gate.
star.result: Zero open findings at renewal; the axe gate has blocked 23 regressions since.

accomplishments.resumeBullet: Closed a 94-finding accessibility audit to zero and gated CI so it stays there (23 regressions blocked since).

accomplishments.title: Wrote the onboarding path new hires actually finish
accomplishments.resumeBullet: Authored the frontend onboarding runbook — new-hire first-PR time dropped from 3 weeks to 4 days.

accomplishments.title: Deleted flakiness from the merge queue
accomplishments.resumeBullet: Stabilized the merge queue: quarantined and fixed 41 flaky tests, retry rate 18% → 1.2%.

accomplishments.title: Spoke at a regional React meetup on the virtualization rework
accomplishments.resumeBullet: Presented the dashboard-virtualization case study to ~200 engineers at a regional React meetup.

highlights: Primary reviewer for the payments surface (214 reviews)
Unblocked the mobile team's design-system adoption — 9 pairing sessions, 3 migration PRs reviewed end-to-end
